stories.title: M's Raleigh lands on IL for first time in career
stories.summary: The Mariners placed catcher Cal Raleigh on the 10-day injured list on Thursday morning with a right oblique strain, the first IL stint of the AL MVP runner-up's career in his sixth major league season.

stories.title: Source: Oilers fire Knoblauch after two Cup Finals...
stories.summary: Despite back-to-back Stanley Cup Final appearances in 2024 and 2025 and with an extension that had not yet begun, Oilers coach Kris Knoblauch has been fired.

stories.title: Higgo late to tee time, gets 2-shot penalty at PGA...
stories.summary: Garrick Higgo finds himself in early contention at the PGA Championship despite a two-stroke penalty to begin his round after arriving one minute late for Thursday morning's tee time at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: NBA lands on '3-2-1 lottery' proposal, per Silver
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver confirmed on Stephen A. Smith's radio show Wednesday that the NBA has landed on a proposal to present to the league's board of governors later this month to revamp the league's draft lottery in an attempt to curb tanking.

stories.title: Hall of Famer Leslie to be honored with statue
stories.summary: Hall of Famer Lisa Leslie, who led the Sparks to two titles, will be honored with a statue on Sept. 20 in the Star Plaza outside of Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles.
